specific_question: How will Lee’s Market make chatbot conversations easier for customers who speak different languages by May 31, 2026?
answer: By December 31, 2025, Lee’s Market will train its chatbots using customer data to determine the top five languages used online and in stores. This upgrade is projected to enhance chatbot understanding and reduce response delays by approximately 10%.
dr_question: How can Lee’s Market use conversational AI and data-driven chatbots to capture the growing Centennial market by providing them with instant feedback and responding to cultural and linguistic nuances among its diverse customer base by May 2026?
